card.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Display", Roboto, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", sans-serif

card.border-top: [[[ return '1px solid ' + (function(){ var t = parseFloat(states['sensor.davis_temperature'] ? states['sensor.davis_temperature'].state : 'NaN'); var w = states['weather.kmocapeg36']; var cond = w ? w.state : ''; if (isNaN(t)) return 'hsl(215 25% 62% / 0.55)'; var f = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (t - 10) / 85)); var h = 225 - f * 213, s = 65, l = 68; if (['rainy','pouring','lightning','lightning-rainy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 205; s = 70; } if (['snowy','snowy-rainy','hail'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 210; s = 30; l = 80; } if (['fog','cloudy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { s = 25; } return 'hsl(' + h + ' ' + s + '% ' + l + '% / 0.55)'; })() ]]]

layout.grid-template-areas: "hero hero hourly hourly hourly hourly" "hero hero daily daily daily daily" "wind rain press humid uv sun" "rose rose chart_temp chart_temp chart_rainwind chart_rainwind" "foot foot foot foot foot foot"

(max-width: 640px).grid-template-areas: "hero hero" "hourly hourly" "daily daily" "wind rain" "press humid" "uv sun" "rose rose" "chart_temp chart_temp" "chart_rainwind chart_rainwind" "foot foot"

(max-width: 1099px).grid-template-areas: "hero hero hero" "hourly hourly hourly" "daily daily daily" "wind rain press" "humid uv sun" "rose chart_temp chart_temp" "rose chart_rainwind chart_rainwind" "foot foot foot"

temp.text-shadow: [[[ return '0 0 60px ' + (function(){ var t = parseFloat(states['sensor.davis_temperature'] ? states['sensor.davis_temperature'].state : 'NaN'); var w = states['weather.kmocapeg36']; var cond = w ? w.state : ''; if (isNaN(t)) return 'hsl(215 25% 62% / 0.45)'; var f = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (t - 10) / 85)); var h = 225 - f * 213, s = 65, l = 68; if (['rainy','pouring','lightning','lightning-rainy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 205; s = 70; } if (['snowy','snowy-rainy','hail'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 210; s = 30; l = 80; } if (['fog','cloudy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { s = 25; } return 'hsl(' + h + ' ' + s + '% ' + l + '% / 0.45)'; })() ]]]

card.border-top: [[[ var r = parseFloat(states['sensor.davis_rain_rate'] ? states['sensor.davis_rain_rate'].state : '0'); return '1px solid ' + (r > 0 ? '#55c2f0' : (function(){ var t = parseFloat(states['sensor.davis_temperature'] ? states['sensor.davis_temperature'].state : 'NaN'); var w = states['weather.kmocapeg36']; var cond = w ? w.state : ''; if (isNaN(t)) return 'hsl(215 25% 62% / 0.55)'; var f = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (t - 10) / 85)); var h = 225 - f * 213, s = 65, l = 68; if (['rainy','pouring','lightning','lightning-rainy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 205; s = 70; } if (['snowy','snowy-rainy','hail'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { h = 210; s = 30; l = 80; } if (['fog','cloudy'].indexOf(cond) >= 0) { s = 25; } return 'hsl(' + h + ' ' + s + '% ' + l + '% / 0.55)'; })()); ]]]

chart.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Display", Roboto, "Segoe UI", "Noto Sans", sans-serif
